form.formComment: Last start was fourth after a quick start, behind From Tigerland at Gloucester Park over 1730m in a 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on April 7 at $16. Performed better the start before with a good run when 2nd (Fr3) over 1609m after showing early speed at Bunbury, beaten 3.5 m by Karaoke Star (1:58.40) in 4yo+ NR up to 45 on April 4 at $1.35. Expected to be in the finish again.

Expected to be in the finish again.

form.formComment: Last start saluted by 20 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr1) at Wagin (2:45.00) beating Twoheartonediamond in 4yo+ 2-4 WINs on April 2 at $1.70. Can go back-to-back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start saluted by 20 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr1) at Wagin (2:45.00) beating Twoheartonediamond in 4yo+ 2-4 WINs on April 2 at $1.70. Can go back-to-back.

form.formComment: Backing up quickly after was driven from back in the field when 11th (Fr6) over 1730m at Gloucester Park, beaten 21 m by Vinnies Star (2:08.60) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on April 7 at $18. The start before 7th (Fr5) over 1780m after racing wide at this track beaten 12 m by Ciao Babe (2:13.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 45 on March 20 at $2.75. Well drawn and expected to bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Race keenly through the early stages after successfully finding the lead.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr5) over 2190m at this track, beaten 30 m by True Grit (2:40.30) in 4yo+ NR 45 to 56 on March 20 at $41. Two runs back 6th (Sr1) over 2190m at this track, beaten 16 m by The Whizzer (2:42.70) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on March 10 at $8. Not going well enough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr5) over 2190m at this track, beaten 30 m by True Grit (2:40.30) in 4yo+ NR 45 to 56 on March 20 at $41. Two runs back 6th (Sr1) over 2190m at this track, beaten 16 m by The Whizzer (2:42.70) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on March 10 at $8. Not going well enough.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 12th (Fr3) over 2100m after being wide early at Bunbury well beaten by Brought To Light (2:35.10) in 4yo+ NR up to 59 on April 4 at $61. Before that, 10th (Fr2) over 2130m at Gloucester Park, beaten 18 m by Arum (2:39.60) in 4yo+ NR 55 to 65 on March 27 at $23. Watch for a spike in form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 12th (Fr3) over 2100m after being wide early at Bunbury well beaten by Brought To Light (2:35.10) in 4yo+ NR up to 59 on April 4 at $61. Before that, 10th (Fr2) over 2130m at Gloucester Park, beaten 18 m by Arum (2:39.60) in 4yo+ NR 55 to 65 on March 27 at $23. Watch for a spike in form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Severely checked and broke gait in the back straight on the first occasion.

form.formComment: Two back was third behind Pick Me at Bridgetown over 2190m in a 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on March 22 at $14. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Kolisi at Wagin over 1776m in a 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 2 at $71. Among the contenders.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was third behind Pick Me at Bridgetown over 2190m in a 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on March 22 at $14. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Kolisi at Wagin over 1776m in a 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 2 at $71. Among the contenders.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over-raced during the early and middle stages.
Gave ground from the 500m to be beaten 112m.
Hung inwards under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr4) over 2130m at Gloucester Park, beaten 19 m by Elephant Rock (2:37.60) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on March 17 at $13. Before that, 7th (Fr2) over 2190m at this track, beaten 30 m by Lucky Copy (2:40.10) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on March 10 at $20. Capable of much more.

form.formComment: Last start 2nd (Sr2) over 1780m at this track beaten a nose by Hot Cinder (2:11.60) in 4yo+ NR up to 45 on March 20 at $23. Two runs back 7th (Fr1) over 2242m after showing early speed at Narrogin, beaten 35 m by Art Ideal (2:46.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 65 on March 13 at $61. Must go to another level.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 2nd (Sr2) over 1780m at this track beaten a nose by Hot Cinder (2:11.60) in 4yo+ NR up to 45 on March 20 at $23. Two runs back 7th (Fr1) over 2242m after showing early speed at Narrogin, beaten 35 m by Art Ideal (2:46.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 65 on March 13 at $61. Must go to another level.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 7th (Sr2) over 1730m at Gloucester Park beaten 40 m by From Tigerland (2:04.80) in 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on April 7 at $91. Before that was well beaten after breaking at Gloucester Park on March 31. Needs to lift.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't do much last time out, 7th (Sr2) over 1730m at Gloucester Park beaten 40 m by From Tigerland (2:04.80) in 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on April 7 at $91. Before that was well beaten after breaking at Gloucester Park on March 31. Needs to lift.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait as the start was affected.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr4) over 2130m after racing wide at Central Wheatbelt beaten 60 m by American Monarch (2:40.30) in 4yo+ NR 48 to 54 on September 21 at $34. Probably needs this hit-out.
